difficulty_progression_policy.phase_1_to_2: Mostly Easy with first Medium introductions
difficulty_progression_policy.phase_3_to_7: Medium-dominant progression with controlled Hard exposure
difficulty_progression_policy.phase_8_to_10: Advanced integration, Hard-heavy reinforcement, mixed-topic synthesis

topic_progression_policy: Start with data-structure primitives and local reasoning
Add linked list + tree recursive composition
Introduce heap and graph traversal systems
Transition into DP optimization and greedy proofs
Finish with interval/bit/math synthesis and hard capstones

phases.name: Core Foundations
phases.focus: Hashing, pointers, stack, binary search, linked list/tree/DP/bit/math basics
phases.exit_gate: >=80% first-attempt AC on Easy set and clean invariant explanations

phases.name: Hashing and Two-Pointer Expansion
phases.focus: Frequency maps, sorted two-pointer scans, first combinatorial mediums
phases.exit_gate: Can choose hashing vs sorting vs two-pointers with complexity justification

phases.name: Sliding Window and Stack Fluency
phases.focus: Dynamic/fixed windows, monotonic stacks, expression/state stacks
phases.exit_gate: Can derive valid window condition and monotonic stack invariant from problem text

phases.name: Rotations, Linked Lists, and Tree Core
phases.focus: Conditional binary search, pointer choreography, DFS/BFS tree structure
phases.exit_gate: Can implement medium linked-list/tree tasks without template dependency

phases.name: Tree Depth and Heap Basics
phases.focus: Composite DFS objectives and priority-queue strategies
phases.exit_gate: Can combine traversal with global state and prune backtracking search trees

phases.name: Graph and DP Intermediate
phases.focus: Connectivity, cloning, feasibility graphs, and 1D/2D DP
phases.exit_gate: Can model state graphs explicitly and map recurrence relations correctly

phases.name: Advanced Windows, Heaps, and Graphs
phases.focus: Hard pattern composition and cross-topic algorithm selection
phases.exit_gate: Can solve Hard tasks with explicit invariant and complexity proof

phases.name: Dynamic Programming Deepening
phases.focus: Knapsack variants, subsequence DP, optimization alternatives
phases.exit_gate: Can derive transitions from objective and convert memoization <-> tabulation

phases.name: Greedy and Interval Systems
phases.focus: Proof-oriented greedy decisions and interval scheduling/merging
phases.exit_gate: Can justify greedy optimality or identify when DP is required

phases.name: Final Math/Bit Consolidation
phases.focus: Fast arithmetic techniques and low-level representation confidence
phases.exit_gate: Interview-ready mixed-topic performance under timed constraints
